fields.name: Production Forecast Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the demand forecast to which the entry belongs.

fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item identification number of the entry.

fields.name: Forecast Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date of the demand forecast to which the entry belongs.

fields.name: Forecast Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantities you have entered in the demand forecast within the selected time interval.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Qty. per Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the valid number of units that the unit of measure code represents for the demand forecast entry.

fields.name: Forecast Quantity (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the entry stated, in base units of measure.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location that is linked to the entry.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant that is linked to the entry.

fields.name: Component Forecast
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the forecast entry is for a component item.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a brief description of your forecast.
